Class JdkSerializerMessageConverter

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.messaging.converter.AbstractMessageConverter
org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.SerializerMessageConverter
org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.JdkSerializerMessageConverter
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageConverter, SmartMessageConverter
public class JdkSerializerMessageConverter extends SerializerMessageConverter implements MessageConverter
MessageConverter adapter for JdkSerializationRedisSerializer. Useful to inherit supported mimetype defaults.
Since:
4.1
Author:
Mark Paluch

  • Constructor Details

    • JdkSerializerMessageConverter

      public JdkSerializerMessageConverter(@Nullable ClassLoader classLoader)
      Create a new JdkSerializerMessageConverter given ClassLoader.
      Parameters:
      classLoader - the class loader to use for deserialization; can be null to use the default class loader.

    • JdkSerializerMessageConverter

      public JdkSerializerMessageConverter(JdkSerializationRedisSerializer serializer)
      Create a new JdkSerializerMessageConverter given JdkSerializationRedisSerializer.
      Parameters:
      serializer - the serializer to use.
